senators.name: Lisa Murkowski
senators.notNerdReason: B.A. in economics and J.D. in law. No STEM degree. However, as former chair of the Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee, she has deep engagement with energy policy data and Arctic research. Moderate on climate science compared to her party. Strong policy expertise but primarily legal and political background.
education: J.D., Willamette University College of Law
experience: Former Chair, Senate Energy and Natural Resources Committee

senators.name: Dan Sullivan
senators.notNerdReason: Joint J.D. and M.S. in Foreign Service from Georgetown. Strong academic credentials and extensive military and legal career. Policy focus is on defense and foreign affairs rather than STEM or evidence-based governance. No technical or scientific background.
experience: U.S. Assistant Secretary of State for Economic, Energy, and Business Affairs
Commissioner, Alaska Dept. of Natural Resources

AK-01.name: Nick Begich III
AK-01.nerdReason: Founded FarShore Partners, a software development company with 160+ employees internationally. MBA from Indiana University with a focus on entrepreneurship and technology. Career spans software development, technology, and product development roles at Ford Motor Company. Brings genuine tech industry experience to Congress.
experience: Founder and Executive Chairman, FarShore Partners (software development)
Ford Motor Company (technology, finance, product development)
